title: hieracium horridum var. genuinum
intro: Hieracium horridum var. genuinum, also known as the rough hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues such as constipation and bloating. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health, with benefits including enhanced immune function and reduced risk of chronic diseases. The rough hawkweed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in some traditional remedies for its potential to aid in detoxification and support liver health.
